reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent application, located the specified agent, verified its idle status, sent a math question, received a correct response containing "4", and captured a screenshot documenting the successful interaction.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with the SuperAgent application and sidebar showing available agents.
Step 2: Located and clicked on agent "QA-20260608-200235-mgem" in the sidebar — Agent page opened successfully and the chat interface was displayed.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (acceptable status per requirements).

Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed into the input field and sent successfully via the Send button. The UI transitioned to show the message in the chat thread and agent status changed to "working".
Step 5: Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Response was received almost immediately (within seconds). The "Working..." indicator disappeared and the agent response was displayed.

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent response was the single character "4", which correctly answers the mathematical question. Screenshot captured showing the complete chat exchange with the user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent response "4". The session was automatically renamed to "Math Basics Addition Question".
